label: Transparent albatross wing motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Albatross transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete albatross wing motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single elegant albatross wing extended in a long gliding arc, white primary feather surfaces with crisp black wing tips and charcoal feather edges, subtle ocean-air highlights, realistic feather layering, clean silhouette. No body, no head, no feet, only the wing as the motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete wing cutout with generous padding, wide horizontal span, no cropping, crisp edges, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject, no sky scene, no ocean scene, no bird body, no extra feathers, no props, no labels, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Albatross light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Albatross, derived from an albatross wing motif.
Canvas: exact 16:9 3840x2160 design board, crisp readable text, broad horizontal layout, wide navigation system.
Visual identity: white albatross wing surfaces, black wing tips and charcoal feather edges, ocean blue primary accents, open sea neutrals, mist white backgrounds, deep horizon ink, pale foam borders. Use strong white/black wing contrast and expansive open-ocean spacing.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Albatross, Albatross Wing, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Wide Navigation, Components, Dashboard Charts, Data Table, Forms, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: full-width top navigation with many tabs, secondary side navigation, breadcrumbs, buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, metric tiles, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, operational dashboard, sortable table, form panel, command palette, empty/loading/error/success states, texture swatches, spacing/radius/border/shadow tokens.
Text requirements: all labels must be clean and readable; use only generic product UI labels like Fleet, Routes, Signals, Reports, Status, Search, Submit, Save, Cancel, Active, Warning, Error, Success; no random brand names.
Composition: sophisticated operational SaaS board, restrained and scan-friendly, with long horizontal rails and wing-like section dividers. Include a small cutout-style albatross wing asset example.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no tiny illegible text, no generic purple gradient, no stock landing page, no misspelling of Morphous Albatross.

Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no tiny illegible text, no neon palette, no generic purple gradient, no stock landing page, no misspelling of Morphous Albatross.
